supportLevel: Unofficial public Microsoft Fabric status mirror based on HTML scraping

active.detailsHtml: Microsoft Fabric customers with tenants located in East US region may experience issues with submitting Spark jobs, executing notebook operations, or rendering Python and R visuals. Engineers are investigating the issue and an update will be provided soon.
active.detailsText: Microsoft Fabric customers with tenants located in East US region may experience issues with submitting Spark jobs, executing notebook operations, or rendering Python and R visuals. Engineers are investigating the issue and an update will be provided soon.
